markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Provide updates on GrowthX's product development, strategy, and ongoing projects across teams.](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is refining its Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) to focus on B2B companies needing high-volume, complex content](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [The company is developing a new framework ("Flow") to make workflow creation more modular and flexible](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [Several new features are in development, including a knowledge base, AI-assisted editing tools, and improved analytics](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
  - [GrowthX is exploring the creation of a freemium GEO (Generative AI Optimization) tracker product](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)

## Topics

### Company Strategy and ICP Refinement

  - [Board meetings went well; investors are excited about GrowthX's positioning in the AI-driven marketing shift](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [Refining ICP to focus on B2B companies with high content needs, decision authority, and realistic expectations](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [Implementing ICP scoring across tools (HubSpot, Linear) to prioritize high-fit clients](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Goal: Onboard clients quickly to strategy sprint and retain for at least 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)

### Product Development Horizons

1.  GEO (Generative AI Optimization) tracking and adaptation
      - [Developing a freemium GEO tracker product to help find more ICP-fit clients](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)
      - [Integrating SEO and GEO analytics within Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=1799.0)
2.  Efficiency improvements for content marketing service
      - [Developing BI reports to identify time sinks and bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)
      - [Converting linear workflows to agent-based workflows for flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
3.  Future infrastructure development
      - [Building AI Ops engineering infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)
      - [Exploring potential for creating an ecosystem of shareable tools](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)

### New Framework Development ("Flow")

  - [Creating a modular, componentized system for workflow creation](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=3703.0)
  - [Abstracting away complexities of underlying systems (e.g., Temporal)](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=3731.0)
  - [Key modules: Flow Core, Prompt, LLM, Evaluator, and API](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=3703.0)
  - [Improved developer experience with simpler syntax and reduced boilerplate](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=3866.0)

### Knowledge Base Development

  - [Building a retrieval pipeline for private data content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=2032.0)
  - [Using Neo4j for knowledge graph storage](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=2891.0)
  - [Features include markdown source processing, context retrieval, and graph-based querying](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=2903.0)

### AI Editor Improvements

  - [Restructured TipTap editor for more flexibility and modularity](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=3185.0)
  - [New features: resizable chat sidebar, automatic inclusion of client rules/guidelines, multi-editor support](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=3336.0)

### IDE Concept for Workflow Creation

  - [Prototyping an IDE-like experience for creating and managing workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=4619.0)
  - [Features include workflow visualization, testing scenarios, prompt playground, and evaluation tools](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=4710.0)
  - [Designed to be used by both human developers and AI agents](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=4754.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue development of the Flow framework and its components](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=4981.0)
  - [Implement ICP scoring across tools and processes](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=4981.0)
  - [Advance the knowledge base and AI editor projects](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=4981.0)
  - [Further explore the IDE concept for workflow creation](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=4981.0)
  - [Hire additional team members, including a data scientist and full-stack developer for Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/ZDrwKNezxcpfyGHsL7YLbsbFM26pya6_?tab=summary&timestamp=4981.0)
